scope: read-only attribution of the failed low-noise Cartesian-covector pretraining to dual-score versus primal-endpoint lattice metrics; no optimizer step, new mechanism, H1b-H6 or tensor conditioning

prerequisites.source_decision: stop before joint training and diagnose the learned Cartesian carrier without adding steps, seeds or another simultaneous mechanism

decision_rule.metric_mismatch: if every threshold passes, attribute the low-noise failure to optimizing the dual covector metric G^-1 while endpoint displacement is measured in the primal metric G; only a separately frozen probability-path/metric proposal may follow
decision_rule.carrier_failure: otherwise retain the current probability path and diagnose carrier direction/scale without adding training
decision_rule.boundary: This read-only audit cannot change the failed pretraining result, add steps or seeds, initialize joint training, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
